expectations.evidence: Written directly as compressed rules. No before/after format. 2 sentences total.

(1) 'propose the fix, not the error' = propose fix immediately. (2) 'state what to do and why' = explain user actions with reason. (3) 'Never retry unchanged' = no blind retry. (4) 'Three failures without progress — stop and ask' = ask after 3 attempts.
2 lines of content (excluding the # header). Well under 5.
